headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -68.3)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 38% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 141 quotes, most at strong intensity (107 strong vs 34 moderate/mild) - people are expressing serious grievances today.

• The frustration score of 70.4 sits in the upper-middle range but well below the 139-day peak of 164.3.

• Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's deep low (-47.6 to -23.5) though still remains below average activity levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
